resultList.dtldesc: Experience comfortable urban living in this well-planned 3 BHK apartment in Whitefield, Bangalore. Located in one of the citys most sought-after residential and IT corridors, this ready-to-move home offers spacious interiors, excellent connectivity and modern conveniences. A key highlight is its location next to Vydehi Metro Station and near the upcoming Prestige Tech Park, making it an ideal choice for families, working professionals and investors. The property is also an E-Khata apartment, ensuring hassle-free ownership. Situated on the 11th floor of a premium residential development, this semi-furnished apartment spans 1724 sq. ft of super built-up area. The thoughtfully designed layout comprises three spacious bedrooms, two bathrooms and two balconies overlooking the clubhouse, creating a bright and refreshing living environment. The living and dining areas are well-proportioned, offering ample space for family gatherings and everyday comfort. Large windows and balcony openings ensure excellent cross-ventilation and natural light throughout the day. The apartment features a modular kitchen fitted with a chimney, providing a functional and organised cooking space. A separate dining area further enhances convenience and adds to the overall practicality of the layout. Vitrified flooring across the apartment lends a contemporary appeal while ensuring durability and easy maintenance. The main entrance faces south, while the balconies face north, promoting balanced airflow and natural illumination.

resultList.dtldesc: Experience comfortable and contemporary living with this spacious 3 BHK apartment available for sale in Jigani, Bangalore. Located in the prestigious DLF Maiden Heights by DLF Ltd., this ready-to-move residence offers a perfect blend of modern amenities, thoughtful design and peaceful surroundings. Overlooking a beautiful garden and park, the apartment is ideal for families seeking a serene yet well-connected lifestyle.Property SpecificationsSituated on the sixth floor of a 12-storey tower, this well-planned apartment features a carpet area of 1250 sq. ft and comprises three spacious bedrooms, three bathrooms and three balconies. The balconies allow ample natural light and ventilation while offering soothing views of the surrounding greenery.Offered in a semi-furnished condition, the apartment provides the flexibility to personalise the interiors according to individual preferences. The west-facing residence enjoys excellent airflow and a bright ambience. This ready-to-move resale property, aged between 5 and 10 years, has been well maintained and reflects quality construction. The spacious layout has been designed to ensure comfort and functionality for modern family living.FacilitiesThe apartment comes with one covered parking space and is served by two lifts for convenient access. Residents benefit from 24-hour water supply and minimal power interruptions, ensuring a comfortable living experience. Reserved parking and the pleasant garden and park views further enhance the appeal of the property. Being a freehold property, it offers complete ownership rights and long-term security.DLF Maiden Heights provides a host of lifestyle amenities for residents. The well-equipped clubhouse and gymnasium cater to recreation and fitness needs, while the beautifully landscaped celebration garden serves as an ideal venue for community gatherings and festive occasions. The project offers a vibrant and family-friendly environment amidst lush green surroundings.LocalityJigani has emerged as one of South Bangalores fast-growing residential destinations, offering excellent connectivity and robust infrastructure. The locality enjoys easy access to major employment hubs, reputed educational institutions, healthcare centres, supermarkets and shopping destinations. Well-developed roads ensure smooth connectivity to different parts of Bangalore, making daily commuting convenient.Combining spacious interiors, reliable infrastructure, premium amenities and the trusted quality of DLF Maiden Heights, this 3 BHK apartment presents an excellent opportunity to own a comfortable and well-connected home in Bangalore.

resultList.dtldesc: 2 BHK flat in Axis Antara Akshaya Nagar Bannerghatta Main Road Bangalore. Located in Axis Antara near Bannerghatta Main Road this readytomove residence offers a perfect blend of functionality convenience and modern lifestyle features. Positioned in a welldeveloped residential locality with excellent social infrastructure nearby the property is ideal for families and professionals seeking a comfortable urban home. Spread across a super area of 870 sq. ft this furnished apartment is situated on the 3rd floor of a 4storey building. The residence is thoughtfully planned to maximise space utilisation while ensuring a bright and airy living environment. The apartment comprises two spacious bedrooms and two welldesigned bathrooms planned to cater comfortably to daily family requirements. The living and dining spaces follow a combined layout creating a seamless flow that enhances openness and supports comfortable family interactions. A modular kitchen fitted with a chimney provides a functional cooking area with practical storage arrangements. The property also includes a balcony overlooking pleasant views of the swimming pool and landscaped garden areas creating a refreshing atmosphere. Wooden flooring adds warmth and elegance to the interiors while enhancing the overall appearance of the home. The apartment is Vaastu compliant and enjoys a Southfacing orientation. A gas connection provision is available and can be activated as required. Residents can enjoy a wide range of modern amenities designed to enhance everyday living. The property includes covered parking spaces for two cars along with EV charging provisions offering additional convenience for vehicle owners. The development provides regular water supply power backup arrangements security systems and three lifts for smooth accessibility. Multiple modern lifestyle amenities further contribute towards a comfortable residential experience.The property enjoys excellent connectivity and access to extensive social infrastructure. Several educational institutions including schools play schools and colleges are located within approximately 1 km of the property. Major healthcare facilities including Rainbow Fortis and Apollo hospitals are accessible within around 3 km. Bommasandra Metro connectivity is available nearby improving daily travel convenience. Shopping and lifestyle destinations including Meenakshi Mall Gopalan Mall DMart supermarkets and cafes are also easily accessible. Sports academies located within approximately 100 metres further enhance the lifestyle appeal of the location.

resultList.dtldesc: 2 BHK flat in Jains Prakriti Block 7th Jayanagar Bangalore offering a comfortable residential lifestyle in one of the citys most established and soughtafter neighbourhoods. Located in Jains Prakarti Apartment this ready to move home is ideal for families and professionals seeking a spacious residence with modern amenities and excellent connectivity to educational institutions healthcare facilities and metro access. This unfurnished apartment offers a carpet area of 1132 sq. ft and is situated on the 1st floor of a 13storey residential tower. The apartment comprises 2 spacious bedrooms 2 bathrooms and 2 balconies designed to provide good ventilation and natural light throughout the home. The property is south facing and overlooks landscaped amenities including the swimming pool and garden areas creating a calm and refreshing ambience. The apartment features a separate living and dining arrangement that enhances privacy and functionality. A modular kitchen has been provided for convenient daytoday usage. Marble flooring across the interiors adds elegance while ensuring durability and easy maintenance. Open parking is available for residents and the building is equipped with 2 lifts for smooth accessibility and convenience. Essential facilities such as water supply power backup security arrangements and wellmaintained common infrastructure contribute to a comfortable lifestyle within the residential complex. Residents of Jains Prakarti Apartment enjoy access to a range of modern lifestyle amenities designed for comfortable community living. The project includes a swimming pool landscaped gardens community hall childrens play area playground sports room and recreational spaces suitable for all age groups. The organised residential environment and open spaces further enhance the overall living experience. Strategically located in Jayanagar Block 7 the apartment enjoys excellent connectivity to major parts of Bangalore. Reputed schools and hospitals are situated within approximately 1 km of the property ensuring convenient access to education and healthcare facilities. Metro connectivity and bus stand access are also available within around 1 km supporting easy daily commuting across the city. The property is located near JSS College adding to the educational advantages of the locality. Jayanagar is regarded as one of Bangalores prime residential neighbourhoods known for its treelined roads strong civic infrastructure vibrant commercial areas and excellent connectivity. The area offers a balanced urban lifestyle with access to shopping centres restaurants parks educational institutions and healthcare facilities making it highly preferred among families and professionals alike.

resultList.dtldesc: Discover a sophisticated 4 BHK independent villa that seamlessly blends modern architecture with biophilic design. Located in the rapidly developing area of Ittangur, this property offers a perfect mix of luxury, privacy, and long-term value appreciation. The villa is part of the prestigious Tattvam Woodsvale project, designed to provide an energy-efficient and high-quality living experience. This east-facing home is Vastu compliant, ensuring ample natural light and positive energy flow throughout the spacious interiors.::::Property Specifications::This independent villa features a super built-up area of 2,312 sq. ft and sits on a plot area of 1,503 sq. ft. The layout includes four well-appointed bedrooms and four bathrooms, catering perfectly to the needs of a modern family. The residence also includes additional functional spaces such as a dedicated puja room and a study, providing extra room for work and spiritual needs. The flooring is a premium mix of mosaic, wooden, marble, and granite, adding a touch of elegance to every corner. As a new construction, the villa is ready to move in and is offered in an unfurnished state, allowing you to customise the interiors to your personal taste.::::Facilities::Residents of this gated community benefit from a wide array of world-class facilities designed for leisure and convenience. The project includes a dedicated indoor games room, a cafeteria, and a badminton court for sports enthusiasts. Security is a top priority, with round-the-clock personnel and state-of-the-clock monitoring. Essential services are well-managed, with 24-hour water availability and rare power cuts in the area. The property also features a private garden and park view, overlooking a 9m wide road, providing a serene environment away from the city bustle.::::Locality::Situated on Ittangur Road, the villa enjoys excellent connectivity to major technological hubs and essential services. The neighbourhood is home to prominent educational institutions such as Greenwood High School and TISB School, making it an ideal choice for families with children. The property is also in close proximity to Prestige City, ensuring access to premium retail and dining options. With quick access to major hospitals and shopping malls, the locality offers a balanced lifestyle with all urban conveniences within easy reach.
